title: Poet
content:
Ever the Poet from the land
    Steers his bark and trims his sail;
    Right out to sea his courses stand,
    New worlds to find in pinnace frail.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Ralph Waldo Emerson, titled "Poet", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
